# Stackmatch

Stackmatch helps developers discover stackmates through shared packages, languages, topics, and public dependency fingerprints.

## Canonical Pages

- [Stackmatch](https://stackmatch.dev)
- [Developers](https://stackmatch.dev/developers)
- [Stacks](https://stackmatch.dev/stacks)
- [Topics](https://stackmatch.dev/topics)
- [Top Stackers](https://stackmatch.dev/top-stackers)
- [Stack Leaderboard](https://stackmatch.dev/leaderboard/stacks)
- [Docs](https://stackmatch.dev/docs)
- [Rank Documentation](https://stackmatch.dev/docs/ranks)

## Crawling Guidance

Public directory, documentation, owner, repository, package, language, and topic pages are intended for indexing. Authenticated app surfaces, admin pages, redirects, API endpoints, and missing-data states are not intended for indexing.
